Vendored Print.js browser build
Version: 1.6.0
Source tarball: https://registry.npmjs.org/print-js/-/print-js-1.6.0.tgz

This copy is committed because the current workspace uses a Windows-backed npm
binary against a WSL repo, which prevents a clean package install into this
project. The 1702-EX page loads this same-origin browser build at runtime.
